title: Sex Mex Music Discs (Resource Pack)
description: A resource pack that changes all music discs to be songs by the San Antonio Synth-Punk band Sex Mex.
body:
NOTE: I HAVE EXPLICIT PERMISSION FROM SEX MEX TO RELEASE THIS.

Do note that due to Minecraft changes in 1.21 some songs will cut off without the aid of this datapack: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/sex-mex-music-discs-datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sex-mex-music-discs-datapack)

# Sex Mex Music Discs
### Ever wanted your music discs to be songs by the San Antonio Synth-Punk music project Sex Mex? Well now you can!

![The thumbnail.](https://file.garden/Ze5pQjHwPg7iwG8C/SexMexMusicDiscs_Resourcepack.png)

In my attempts of improving my resource pack knowledge (specifically sound files), I had a stroke of (subjective) genius. I discovered a small then-band called Sex Mex when they played live at a local music venue, and I was immediately hooked. From there, I knew I had to make something involving their music. Finally, this resource pack was made. Here is a list of what each music disc is transformed into:

- 13 --> Good Friends
- Cat --> New Girl
- Blocks --> Baby Mama
- Chirp --> Shit Me Out
- Far --> Runaway
- Mall --> The Mall
- Mellohi --> Electric Chair
- Stal --> Losing Her
- Strad --> Dubble Bubble Blowout
- Ward --> You Belong To Me
- 11 --> Better Off Dead
- Wait --> Pretty Boy
- Otherside --> Goodwill
- 5 --> Pills
- Pigstep --> Nerds Who Play Guitar
- Relic --> Sunshine Flower Power
- Creator (Music Box) --> Sadie
- Precipice --> I Love Everyone
- Creator --> Crashing Down (Unreleased)

If this is you're first time hearing about Sex Mex, here's their linktree (which goes to their bandcamp, streaming profiles, and instagram): [https://linktr.ee/sexmexsux](https://linktr.ee/sexmexsux)

Do note some songs have *gasp* naughty words and adult themes, so if you're not familar with the band err on the side of caution.
